base_size.note: Varies by effect type - particles are 2-4px, speech bubble is 12x10px

shared_attributes.layer: foreground (on top of all other elements)

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Cleaning success indicator that appears when player swipes floor to clean poop
context.screen_position: Spawns on cage floor at y=110-125px, x=random across floor width (0-128px)
adjacent_elements: cage_floor (spawns on this surface after cleaning)
context.usage_scenario: 3 sparkle particles spawn at random floor positions when player completes swipe-to-clean action. Each sparkle appears, expands slightly, then fades over 0.5 seconds. Provides satisfying visual feedback for cleaning.

visual_specification.shape: Star/sparkle shape. 3x3px with 4-point star pattern (center pixel + 4 pixels extending up/down/left/right).

animation.description: Frame 1: Sparkle appears at 3x3px. Frame 2: Expands to 5x5px (adds diagonal pixels). Frame 3: Fades to 0%. Total duration: 0.5 seconds.

visual_specification.details: Star shape: Frame 1: 3x3px cross (5 pixels total - center + 4 cardinal directions) in #FFF1E8. Frame 2: 5x5px star (9 pixels - adds 4 diagonal pixels). Spawns at random x position on floor (y=115±5px). 3 sparkles spawn simultaneously at different x positions when cleaning occurs.

relationships.differences_from: Unlike other particles: expands instead of moving, spawns on floor (not near Echo), triggered by player action (not Echo state), shortest lifespan (0.5s), white/cream color.
